source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for structured English workflow UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, labels, tables, command search, and tabular numerals.
layout: Vertical timeline layouts with stem-like rails, stacked blossom-node states, narrow navigation, 8px component radii, cream panels, magenta primary actions, leaf-green support controls, and disciplined workflow dashboards.

prompts.label: Transparent snapdragon spike motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #00ffff chroma-key background, then local background removal with remove_chroma_key.py.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Snapdragon transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a snapdragon flower spike botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A vertical snapdragon spike with stacked tubular blossoms in rich magenta, blush cream throats, subtle petal veining, leaf-green lanceolate leaves, a slender upright green stem, and soft stem shadows inside the plant form. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, recognizable Antirrhinum snapdragon flower form, no bouquet, no garden scene.
Composition/framing: centered complete vertical cutout with generous padding; include full spike from top florets to lower leaves and stem without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ffff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ffff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no foxglove, no delphinium, no lupine, no rose, no vase, no hand, no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second flower spike.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Snapdragon light-mode design-system board, strict landscape
Primary request: Generate one horizontal 16:9 light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Snapdragon", derived from the visible snapdragon spike motif. It is a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible vertical timeline workflow UI system.
Canvas: strict landscape 16:9 only, target 3840x2160, at least 2400px wide. Do not create a square board or portrait board. Use one clean professional design-system board filling the wide canvas.
Required visible sections: Morphous Snapdragon, Snapdragon Spike, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from rich magenta petals, blush cream flower throats, leaf-green leaves, upright green stem, soft stem-shadow depth, cottage border botanical freshness, and stacked flower-node rhythm. Must read as snapdragon, not foxglove, delphinium, lupine, rose, or generic magenta UI kit.
Design mood: vertical timeline system; central stem-like rail, blossom-node status markers, stacked workflow steps, narrow side navigation, timeline cards, ordered progress states, upright hierarchy.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, workflow navigation, timeline dashboard metric cards, vertical progress chart, operations table, empty/loading/error/success states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, cream paper surfaces, magenta primary actions, leaf-green secondary controls, stem-shadow borders, cream throat highlights, botanical petal-grain texture, readable token chips.
Constraints: no foxglove, no delphinium, no lupine, no rose, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Snapdragon", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Snapdragon dark-mode design-system board, strict landscape
Primary request: Generate one horizontal 16:9 dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Snapdragon". Translate the visible light-mode Snapdragon board into dark mode while preserving the snapdragon spike motif and shadcn/tweakcn vertical timeline workflow system.
Canvas: strict landscape 16:9 only, target 3840x2160, at least 2400px wide. Do not create a square board or portrait board. Use one clean professional design-system board filling the wide canvas.
Required visible sections: Morphous Snapdragon, Snapdragon Spike, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Preserve the snapdragon language: rich magenta primary actions, blush cream flower-throat highlights, leaf-green support states, upright green stem accents, deep stem-shadow dark surfaces, cottage border botanical texture, and stacked blossom-node vertical timeline rhythm. Must read as snapdragon, not foxglove, delphinium, lupine, rose, or generic magenta UI kit.
Design mood: vertical timeline system; dark central stem-like rail, glowing blossom-node status markers, stacked workflow steps, narrow side navigation, timeline cards, ordered progress states, upright hierarchy.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, workflow navigation, timeline dashboard metric cards, vertical progress chart, operations table, empty/loading/error/success states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep green-brown stem-shadow background, petal-cream foreground text, magenta controls, leaf-green status, cream throat highlights, subtle petal-grain and leaf-vein texture overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls, readable token chips.
Constraints: no foxglove, no delphinium, no lupine, no rose, no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Snapdragon".
